home.title: Tianjin Beixiang Machinery | Precision Non-Standard Parts Machining | 30-Year Manufacturer
home.description: Tianjin Beixiang Machinery Co., Ltd. (Beixiang Machinery), a 30-year specialist in precision non-standard mechanical parts machining. We produce shafts, flanges, sheet metal parts, stainless steel components and more. ISO9001/ISO3834 certified, serving Siemens, Vestas and other Fortune 500 companies with one-stop custom machining solutions.
home.keywords: Beixiang Machinery, Tianjin Beixiang Machinery, non-standard parts customization, precision shaft machining, flange machining, sheet metal fabrication, stainless steel machining, ship parts machining, non-ferrous metal machining, wind power parts, medical sheet metal, custom machining, precision machining, CNC machining, one-stop machining, Tianjin machining, ISO9001 machining, Siemens supplier, Vestas supplier, 30-year manufacturer, heavy-duty parts machining

developmentHistory.title: Development History | 30-Year Manufacturer | Tianjin Beixiang Machinery
developmentHistory.description: The development journey of Beixiang Machinery since 2005: from partnering with Fortune 500 companies like Siemens and Flender to achieving intelligent manufacturing transformation, demonstrating 30 years of precision machining expertise.
developmentHistory.keywords: Beixiang Machinery, development history, Tianjin machining, precision manufacturing, 30-year manufacturer

contactUs.title: Contact Us | Tianjin Beixiang Machinery | Precision Machining
contactUs.description: Contact Tianjin Beixiang Machinery Co., Ltd., located in Beichen Science Park, Tianjin, China. Specializing in non-standard parts customization, precision shaft machining, and flange customization. Tel: +86-022-86993965.
contactUs.keywords: contact Beixiang Machinery, Tianjin machining manufacturer, non-standard parts, precision machining, contact

industryApplication.title: Industry Applications | Wind Power/Medical/Shipbuilding/AI Automation - Beixiang Machinery
industryApplication.description: Beixiang Machinery's precision non-standard parts are widely used in new energy wind power, medical healthcare, shipbuilding, AI automation and other industries. We provide custom shaft, flange, and sheet metal machining services to meet diverse industry needs.
industryApplication.keywords: wind power parts machining, medical sheet metal, ship parts machining, non-ferrous metal machining, AI automation parts, precision machining, custom machining, Beixiang Machinery

productsShaft.title: Precision Shaft Machining | Custom Shafts | Drive Shaft/Stepped Shaft Manufacturer - Beixiang Machinery
productsShaft.description: Beixiang Machinery provides medium-to-large custom shaft precision machining, covering drive shafts, generator shafts, intermediate shafts, marine shafts and more. We offer internal/external threading, stepped turning, keyway milling and other processes. 30 years of experience.
productsShaft.keywords: precision shaft machining, custom shaft, drive shaft machining, generator shaft, marine shaft, stepped turning, keyway milling, Beixiang Machinery, CNC machining

productsFlange.title: Flange Custom Machining | Non-Standard Flanges | Marine/Wind Power Flanges - Beixiang Machinery
productsFlange.description: Beixiang Machinery provides custom non-standard flange machining covering marine flanges, wind tower flanges and more. Max machining diameter 1.5 m. ISO9001 certified with 30 years of machining experience. Custom manufacturing from drawings or samples.
productsFlange.keywords: flange custom machining, non-standard flange, marine flange, wind power flange, flange manufacturer, precision machining, Beixiang Machinery, heavy-duty machining

productsValve.title: Hydraulic Manifold Custom Machining | Valve Block Products - Beixiang Machinery
productsValve.description: Beixiang Machinery provides custom hydraulic manifolds, valve blocks, and pneumatic valve block precision machining. Long service life and durability. Widely used in wind power, metallurgy, construction machinery, and automation equipment.
productsValve.keywords: hydraulic manifold, valve block machining, custom machining, CNC machining, precision machining, Beixiang Machinery

productsSheetMetal.title: Sheet Metal Fabrication | CNC Precision Sheet Metal & Coating | Custom Welding/Laser Cutting - Beixiang Machinery
productsSheetMetal.description: Beixiang Machinery provides CNC precision sheet metal fabrication and coating services: laser cutting, CNC bending, custom welding, CNC gantry machining. Max dimensions 6m×3m×2m, C5 corrosion class, 3000-hour salt spray tested. Serving Siemens, Vestas and more.
productsSheetMetal.keywords: sheet metal fabrication, CNC sheet metal coating, laser cutting, CNC bending, custom welding, sheet metal manufacturer, Beixiang Machinery, ISO3834 welding

productsAiAutomation.title: AI Automation Parts Machining | Smart Manufacturing Components - Beixiang Machinery
productsAiAutomation.description: Beixiang Machinery provides high-precision custom components for humanoid robotics and smart manufacturing, covering joint transmission and structural support parts. 30 years of precision machining experience, ISO9001 certified.
productsAiAutomation.keywords: AI automation parts, smart manufacturing, automation components, precision machining, custom machining, Beixiang Machinery, humanoid robot parts

Our productquality and delivery capacity havebeen strictly verified by internationalbenchmark customers.

cards.desc: We have obtained four major interna-tional authoritative certifications, in-cluding ISO9001 Quality Management,IS03834 Welding Quality, ISO45001 Oc-cupational Health and Safety, andISO14001 Environmental Management.Adopting standardized full-process con-trol, we firmly underpin both qualitycompliance and regulatory require-ments.

cards.title:
FULL-CYCLE ONE-STOP 
  AFTER-SALES SERVICE
cards.desc: We have a professional after-salestechnical service team to respond tocustomer needs rapidly. We providefull-process services including instal-lation and commissioning, on-sitetechnical guidance, fault mainte-nance, as well as maintenance andupgrading, fully safeguarding cus-tomers' stable production.

about.introParagraph1: Our capabilities span machining, sheet metal fabrication andwelding, and automated solutions for the wind energy sector.We operate under the stringent ISO 9001 Quality ManagementSystem and the ISO 3834 International Standard for Quality inFusion Welding.
about.introParagraph2: Guided by our principle of ‘Quality First, Customer Supreme,'we have established deep collaborations with several Fortune500 companies, including Joy Global, Flender, Siemens, Winer-gy, and Dynapac.

trade.lead1: Over 10 years of experience in international trade.
trade.lead2: Serving clients in over 30 countries, we possess a profoundunderstanding of global market demands. We are committedto bringing the same internationally proven quality, trustedworldwide, right to your doorstep.
bullets: Has independent import and export rights.
Over 50% of the company's sales performance is attributed to overseas orders.

cards: No. 17, Jingguan East Road, Beichen Science Park,Beichen District, Tianjin, China

cards.title: New Energy Industry
cards.description: Deeply engaged in the field of new energy equipment manufacturing, we spe-cialize in providing core component solutions for the wind power industry. Ourmain products include critical parts such as shafts and flanges, which are spe-cifically applied to key components of wind turbines, including main shafts,generator shafts, nacelle flanges, and hub flanges. The products strictly adhereto the rigorous standards of the wind power industry and are suitable for bothonshore and offshore wind turbine requirements. Featuring excellent proper-ties such as high strength, corrosion resistance, and low-temperature toler-ance, they ensure the long-term stable operation of wind turbines in complexoutdoor environments. This contributes to the efficient and safe power genera-tion of the wind power industry, providing reliable support for the develop-ment of clean energy.

cards.title: Healthcare Industry
cards.description: Relying on precision machining technology, we provide customized metal com-ponent services for the healthcare industry. Our core products include stainlesssteel and high-precision sheet metal casings, such as those used in medicalmonitor housings, ultrasound diagnostic equipment sheet metal parts, infusionpump stainless steel brackets, and sterile instrument storage boxes for medicaldevices and accessories. The products are made from medical-grade stainlesssteel materials and processed through precision techniques like laser cuttingand CNC bending, ensuring dimensional accuracy and surface finish. They offerexcellent corrosion resistance, ease of cleaning, and biocompatibility, strictlymeeting the core requirements of sterility and stability in the medical field,thereby safeguarding the safe operation of medical equipment.

cards.title: Shipbuilding Industry
cards.description: ocusing on the field of marine equipment and supporting systems, we providekey transmission components such as shafts and flanges for various types ofvessels, including emergency rescue boats, bulk carriers, and other ship types.Our products are used in critical parts of transmission systems, such as ship pro-pulsion shafts, tail shafts, propeller flanges, and main engine connection flang-es.
cards.description2: Manufactured from high-strength weldable steel, the components undergoprecision machining and rigorous testing to ensure compatibility with core ap-plications such as ship shaft connections and power transmission. They arecharacterized by robust structure, wear resistance, and strong corrosion resis-tance against seawater, enabling them to effectively withstand the complexmarine environments encountered during vessel operation. This ensures stableand reliable performance of the ship's shafting system, contributing to en-hanced safety and dependability in maritime navigation.

cards.title: AI Automation Industry
cards.description: Keeping pace with the development trends in the automation industry, we pro-vide high-precision components for the humanoid robotics field, covering coreparts such as joint transmission and structural support. Our products are ap-plied to critical positions of humanoid robots, including joint bearings, harmon-ic reducer housings, finger transmission shafts, and forearm support compo-nents.
cards.description2: Utilizing advanced manufacturing processes, we strictly control dimensionaltolerances to ensure our products feature lightweight design, high strength,and low friction characteristics. They are well-suited for key assemblies such asthe dexterous fingers, forearm joints, and waist rotation systems of humanoidrobots, meeting the demands for high-frequency operation and high load-bear-ing capacity. This contributes to enabling precise movements and stable perfor-mance in humanoid robots, providing essential component support for the ad-vancement of the automation industry.

timeline.desc: We have collaboratedwith global Fortune 500 enterprises such as Flender,Siemens, Winergy, and Vestas,specializing in the productionof ring and sleeve products(e.g., bearing rings, gear sleeves,coupling sleeves).
Expanding into new businessareas, we have established partnerships with Joy Global and Dynapac to supply specialized industrial components and solutions.
We have expanded our product line to include precision machining of ring and sleeve products, as well as sheet metal fabrication, providing a wider range of components for industrial applications.
Expanding into new business areas we have establishedpartnerships with Gotion High-techand E-Power Technologies to developand supply components for new energy and power systems.
We have introduced new testing and production equipment, and implemented automated management to enhance manufacturing capacity.
We have added newe quipment, expanded factory facilities, and increased staffing to support scaled-up production and operational growth.
